contexts.context: ...whom the Spaniards name the "great captain," — <mark>Gonzalvo</mark> de Cordova. The catastrophe was soon brought about:...
...Duc de Némours, the French viceroy, with <mark>Gonzalvo</mark> de Cordova: but this was of short duration...
...The Spanish party was weak and unprovided, and <mark>Gonzalvo</mark>, to gain time, fortified himself at Barletta...
...thirst for honour by various challenges and duels. <mark>Gonzalvo</mark> reaped every advantage from this species of warfare,...
